##NAMES=Ferri-winchite
##RRUFFID=R060704
##IDEAL CHEMISTRY=[box](NaCa)(Mg_4_Fe^3+^)Si_8_O_22_(OH)_2_
##LOCALITY=Tirodi mines, Central Provinces, India
##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Michael Scott
##DESCRIPTION=Matted group of tan colored bladed crystals, associated with an even more Fe-rich ferri-winchite
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral is confirmed by single-crystal X-ray diffraction and chemical analysis
##URL=https://www.rruff.net/odr/rruff_sample/R060704
##MEASURED CHEMISTRY=([box]_0.85_Na_0.09_K_0.06_)(Ca_1.36_Na_0.64_)(Mg_4.12_Fe^3+^_0.38_Mn_0.23_Fe^2+^_0.16_Al_0.11_)Si_8.00_O_22_((OH)_1.90_F_0.10_) ; = gray phase
##DIFFRACTION SAMPLE DESCRIPTION=Single crystal, powder profile is calculated
##CELL PARAMETERS=a: 9.8 b: 18 c: 5.24 alpha: 90 beta: 104.5 gamma: 90 volume: 896 crystal system: monoclinic
##FILETYPE=Raman RAW
